name: Sumy Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the historic Cossack and Sloboda Ukraine banner colour

description: A blue field charged in the centre with the coat of arms of Sumy Oblast, featuring three yellow pouches (sumky) — a canting reference to the name 'Sumy'.
history: Adopted as the regional flag of Sumy Oblast in north-eastern Ukraine. The three pouches (sumky) on the arms are a canting allusion to the city's name; the territory was historically part of Sloboda Ukraine.

features.role: arms of Sumy Oblast — three pouches
